title: Studique
desc: A campus platform for SRMIST students that brings attendance, marks, and resources into one clear and reliable system.
mobileDesc: A campus platform for SRMIST students to manage academics in one reliable place.

title: Interact
desc: A product for people joining hackathons without a team, focused on teammate discovery and smoother early collaboration.
mobileDesc: A product that helps hackathon participants find teammates and collaborate faster.

title: GetItDone
desc: A freelance marketplace connecting clients and freelancers with a secure escrow system, project tracking, and dispute resolution.
mobileDesc: A freelance marketplace with secure escrow payments and project tracking.

title: herSpace
desc: A private offline-first cycle tracking app built to keep personal data on-device with a calm and simple experience.
mobileDesc: A private offline-first cycle tracker built around simplicity and on-device privacy.

title: SRMConnect
desc: A platform for managing college communities, members, and events in one place instead of using scattered tools and workflows.
mobileDesc: A platform to manage college communities, members, and events from one place.

title: Brand Visuals
desc: Visual work for products and student communities focused on consistency, clarity, and stronger communication.
mobileDesc: Visual design work focused on clarity, consistency, and stronger communication.
